# Need government contracting help route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## User intent The user wants help selling to federal, state, local, or prime-contractor buyers. ## Best primary route

## When to surface

The user wants help selling to federal, state, local, or prime-contractor buyers.

## Key information

- ## User intent
- The user wants help selling to federal, state, local, or prime-contractor buyers.
- ## Best primary route
- Send Houston-area users to UH APEX when legally formed, for-profit, in the service area, and able to describe what government can buy. If not formed or idea-stage, send to SBDC/SCORE first.
- ## Ask first
- Are you legally formed and for-profit?
- What ZIP/county is the physical business address?

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/default.asp>

## Next handoff

Send Houston-area users to UH APEX when legally formed, for-profit, in the service area, and able to describe what government can buy. If not formed or idea-stage, send to SBDC/SCORE first.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.

Use **View original** in the BOSS Library to open or download the approved public source.
